name: ERP Full-Suite Generation Knowledge Pack
description: Generation rules for the complete ERP order-to-cash, procure-to-pay and financial-close document flow. Each item tells a code generator exactly what entity, fields, ledger/stock posting and validation to emit for quotation, sales order, delivery note, sales invoice, payment receipt, purchase order, purchase receipt, purchase invoice, supplier payment, journal entry, credit/debit notes, month-end and fiscal-year close, trial balance, P&L and balance sheet, plus the shared posting-service, state-machine, sub-ledger/control and tax-template architecture they all depend on.
license: Original professional summaries of widely-established ERP, accounting and software-engineering principles, authored for LocalAIFactory as code-generation guidance. Free to deploy and modify within the application. No vendor documentation, ERPNext/Frappe/SAP text, or any third-party copyrighted material is reproduced verbatim. Principles are framed honestly with confidence levels; no certification or jurisdiction-specific compliance is asserted.
